Client.title: Client
Client.description: Represents a client or staff member in the system.

name.description: Name of the user or company.

AccountingDocument.title: AccountingDocument
AccountingDocument.description: Represents an accounting document uploaded by a client.

clientId.description: ID of the client who owns this document.

storagePath.description: Path to the file in Firebase Storage.

ExtractedData.title: ExtractedData
ExtractedData.description: Represents the extracted data from an accounting document. Embedded within AccountingDocument.

/clients/{clientId}.description: Stores user profiles for clients and staff. The document ID is the Firebase Auth UID.

/documents/{documentId}.description: Stores all accounting documents. Security is based on the 'clientId' field within the document.
